setup.title: 🐷 New Game
setup.subtitle: Set up your player and pick opponents!
setup.name: Your name

temptation.title: 🛍️ Temptation!
temptation.subtitle: Want vs. Need — what will you choose?
temptation.dilemma: 🐷 This is a "want", not a "need". If you skip it, you'll save +$5 in your savings account! But buying feels fun too... What's more important to you?
temptation.bought_text: It feels good now, but that money is gone. Was it worth it? 🤔
temptation.skip_text: You saved $5 into your savings! Saying "no" to wants now means more freedom later. Smart choice!

challenge.title: 🧠 Money Quiz!
challenge.subtitle: Answer correctly to earn ${{reward}} — but wrong answers cost ${{penalty}}!

portfolio.title: 💼 Your Portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: Track your business empire and see your wealth grow!
portfolio.no_biz_text: Land on an Invest space or buy from another player to start building your empire.

daily_reward.title: Daily Log-in Bonus!
daily_reward.subtitle: Welcome back! You get a cash bonus to jumpstart your businesses today.

leaderboard.title: Global Top 50
leaderboard.empty: No players yet! Play a game to be the first!

paywall.title: KidCapital
paywall.subtitle: Unlock the full billionaire experience.
paywall.error: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

end.penny_win: Amazing job! You learned that passive income = freedom. Your money works for YOU now! Keep these skills in real life! 🌟
end.penny_lose: Great effort! Every game teaches you something new about money. Try again and see if you can be the first to reach Financial Freedom! 💪

tutorial.welcome_msg: I'm your money coach! I'll teach you how to become financially free. Let's play!
tutorial.goal_msg: Make your money work FOR you! Buy businesses that earn income every month. When your passive income covers your expenses, you win!
tutorial.win_conditions_msg:
You need ALL of these:
🏪 Own 3+ businesses
🏦 Save $50+
🧠 Quiz accuracy 50%+
💰 No debt
📈 Passive income ≥ expenses
tutorial.roll_intro_msg: Tap the golden "Roll!" button to roll the dice and move around the board!
tutorial.board_explain_msg: Each space has a different action: 🏪 Buy businesses, 💰 Collect income, 🧠 Answer quizzes, and more! Watch where you land!
tutorial.modal_explain_msg: When you land on a space, a card pops up. Read carefully and decide! Every choice affects your money. Close the card to continue.
tutorial.progress_bar_msg: See those icons at the top? 🏪🏦🧠💰 — they show what you still need to win. Fill them all up!
tutorial.penny_tips_msg: I'll pop up during the game with money tips. Tap me to dismiss, but try to read them — they'll help you win! Good luck! 🍀

achievements.empire_builder_desc: Buy 10 businesses total across all games
achievements.quiz_whiz_desc: Answer 5 quizzes correctly in a row

penny.game_start_0: Hi! I'm Penny! Let's become Money Masters together! 🐷
penny.game_start_1: Welcome to KidCapital! Roll the dice and start your journey to Financial Freedom! 💰
penny.first_roll_0: Tap the dice to roll! See where you land! 🎲
penny.first_roll_1: Here we go! Roll and let's see your first move! 🎯
penny.land_invest_0: An Invest space! Businesses earn money FOR you every Payday! 🏪
penny.land_invest_1: Time to shop for a business! Which one will make you money? 🤑
penny.land_invest_2: Investing means your money works while you play! 📈
penny.first_asset_buy_0: You're an investor now! That business will earn you passive income! 🎉
penny.first_asset_buy_1: Your first business! Now you'll earn money every Payday! 🌟
penny.buy_with_loan_0: Loans cost extra because of interest. Pay it off fast! 💳
penny.buy_with_loan_1: You borrowed money — that's debt. It'll be deducted each Payday! ⚠️
penny.cant_buy_debt_0: Can't invest while in debt! Pay it off first — it's blocking your growth! 🚫
penny.cant_buy_debt_1: Debt first, then investing! Clear what you owe to unlock new businesses! 🔓
penny.payday_positive_0: Nice! Your businesses earned you passive income this month! 📊
penny.payday_positive_1: More income than expenses — that's the path to freedom! ✨
penny.payday_positive_2: Your investments are paying off! Keep building! 💪
penny.payday_negative_0: Expenses beat income this month. We need more businesses! 📉
penny.payday_negative_1: Spending more than earning? That's a money leak to fix! 🔧
penny.temptation_skipped_0: Great self-control! That money can now GROW in a business! 🌱
penny.temptation_skipped_1: Smart choice! Wants can wait — your future self says thanks! 💎
penny.temptation_skipped_2: Resisting temptation is a superpower! Your wallet agrees! 🦸
penny.temptation_bought_0: Fun! But remember — spent money can't grow anymore. 💸
penny.temptation_bought_1: Enjoy it! Just know that cash could've earned passive income. 🤷
penny.hustle_0: That's ACTIVE income — you worked for every dollar! 💼
penny.hustle_1: Hard work pays off! But remember: businesses earn while you rest! 🛌
penny.hustle_2: Nice hustle! Active income keeps you going! 💪
penny.quiz_correct_0: You're a money genius! Here's a bonus! 🧠💰
penny.quiz_correct_1: Correct! Knowledge IS power — and cash! 🎓
penny.quiz_wrong_0: Not quite! But now you know — that's what learning is! 📖
penny.quiz_wrong_1: Oops! That's okay — every money mistake is a lesson! 💡
penny.bank_deposit_0: Your savings earn 5% interest each Payday! Compound growth! 🏦
penny.bank_deposit_1: Money in the bank makes MORE money. That's compound interest! ❄️⛄
penny.low_cash_0: Running low on cash! Focus on Payday spaces & hustles! 💸
penny.low_cash_1: Budget alert! Every dollar counts when cash is tight! 📋
penny.near_freedom_0: Almost there! One more investment could do it! 🏁
penny.near_freedom_1: SO close to Financial Freedom! Your passive income is almost enough! 🔥
penny.win_0: FINANCIAL FREEDOM! Your money works FOR you! You did it! 🏆🎉
penny.win_1: YOU'RE FREE! Passive income covers all your bills! AMAZING! 🦋✨
penny.life_event_good_0: Lucky break! But smart investors don't rely on luck! 🍀
penny.life_event_good_1: Bonus cash! Maybe save or invest it? 🤔
penny.life_event_bad_0: Life happens! That's why an emergency fund matters! 🛡️
penny.life_event_bad_1: Unexpected costs are part of life. Savings protect you! 💪
penny.generic_0: Keep going! Every turn is a step toward freedom! 🚶
penny.generic_1: Remember: passive income is the goal! 🎯
